ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order (especially for online transactions) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "online" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction was made online */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit made from the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, PayPal) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount of the transaction */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for online transactions */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for online transactions */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer for online transactions */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for online transactions (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line or category */,
  "product_class" TEXT /* Class or type of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "list_price" TEXT /* List price of the product */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions (length, width, height) of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer resides */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level drops below the reorder level */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the next reorder is expected */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Location of the product on the shelf */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the store closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  "store_area" TEXT /* Total area of the store */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last store audit */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next store audit */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the store (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the manager */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the manager */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session */,
  "next_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the next training session */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
